summary: Partial-OBE — current sections.json text reads 'the demoted rows are exactly the two retrospective/post-window rows on a six-row page', which is the first half of ISS-1218's recommended softening (verbatim match on 'exactly' + 'retrospective/post-window'). The second half — adding 'the four unchanged rows are all rows whose verdict windows are still open or only partially closed' — introduces a substantive new claim about all six rows and is closer to deep-attack scope than verification. Recommend close-as-partial-done; the four-rows clarification can be raised as a fresh ISS by curmudgeon on a future c-cycle if it still matters.
